entries.title: Senior Software Engineer
achievements: Built frontend architecture and client-side web apps with <React>, <Next.js>, and <TypeScript>
Collaborated with customers: clarified business logic, translated requirements into technical solutions
Agreed on API contracts with backend team, ensured correct integrations
Coordinated task execution within dev team: decomposition, estimation, prioritization
Implemented quality practices: automated testing (<Jest>), monitoring (<Sentry>), <CI/CD>
Built a team resource management service from scratch using <FSD> and testing, reducing time-to-market by 40% (to 2 days per feature)
Automated a reporting dashboard, cutting report generation time from 3 hours to 3–5 minutes
Developed and launched an AI recruiting service: achieved 98% error-free sessions and processed 500+ applications in first months
Modernized corporate messenger gateway with monitoring and error handling, reducing incidents from 5–7 per month to 0
Optimized frontend code and architecture, reducing technical debt and speeding up typical tasks by 20–25%

entries.title: Software Developer
achievements: Developed and maintained frontend apps on <Vue 2> and <React>: bug fixing, new features
Developed and maintained corporate <Firefox> extension using <Firefox Extensions API>
Ensured uninterrupted operation of services with 99.9% availability while continuously adding new functionality

entries.title: Frontend Developer
achievements: Created responsive, cross-browser interfaces from <Figma> mockups
Optimized codebase: migrated class components to functional with hooks
Developed and maintained frontend apps on <Vue 2> and <React>, achieving 99.9% service availability
